name: Neural Nomad #10: Violet — Reflection
description: There are words forming behind your teeth that will change everything once spoken. This is the color of that pressure — violet like a bruise that hasn't surfaced yet, like the sky just before it breaks.
threshold_note: Standing at the edge between what you've always been and what you're about to admit you've become.
collector_meaning: You hold the exact moment when silence becomes too heavy to carry. Some transformations begin with this specific shade of waiting.
